name: last30days
description: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

interface.shortDescription: Research recent discussion across social and web sources
interface.longDescription: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Last 30 Days to research this topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, and web.
